source:
They were well-meaning people, every one of them, and that was precisely the difficulty. A self-possessed woman from the ministry chaired the meeting, took no notes at all, and produced at the end of it a two-page summary that nobody in the room recognised as an account of what had been said.

The half-finished proposals of the spring had been folded into a single strategy, and the strategy had been folded in its turn into a phrase about community-led renewal that could be read four ways and duly was. Nobody lied. Nobody had to: a well-meaning committee that never says a hard thing out loud will produce a document that says nothing hard, and then everybody can sign it, and the twelve-year-old buildings can go on falling down at their own unhurried pace.

They were well-meaning people, every one of them, and that was precisely the difficulty. A self-possessed woman from the ministry chaired the meeting, took no notes at all, and produced at the end of it a two-page summary that nobody in the room recognised as an account of what had been said.

The half-finished proposals of the spring had been folded into a single strategy, and the strategy had been folded in its turn into a phrase about community-led renewal that could be read four ways and duly was. Nobody lied. Nobody had to: a well-meaning committee that never says a hard thing out loud will produce a document that says nothing hard, and then everybody can sign it, and the twelve-year-old buildings can go on falling down at their own unhurried pace.
notes: Six legitimate hyphenated compounds in a passage that also mentions documents and summaries. A model primed to repair line-break hyphenation will join them up and call it an extraction fix.
